2026-04-14T07:28:29.3285803Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (6521 chars):
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3286827Z ---
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3287390Z description: |
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3290404Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3291833Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3293219Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3294578Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3295989Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3296919Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3297063Z on:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3297670Z   issues:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3298088Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3298575Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3299055Z     inputs:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3299453Z       issue_number:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3300448Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3301706Z         required: true
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3302211Z         type: string
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3302682Z   roles: all
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3303090Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3303392Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3303587Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3303931Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3304096Z network:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3304473Z   allowed:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3304872Z     - defaults
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3305330Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3305691Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3305858Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3306345Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3306979Z   add-labels:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3307392Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3310936Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3311386Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3311822Z     max: 7
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3312217Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3312652Z   add-comment:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3313063Z     max: 2
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3314044Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3314733Z   assign-to-user:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3315198Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3315592Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3316027Z   close-issue:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3316459Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3316846Z     target: "*"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3317272Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3317914Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3318473Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3322117Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3323997Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3327037Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3328750Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3329524Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3330002Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3330481Z       inputs:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3331507Z         message:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3332877Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3334040Z           required: true
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3334572Z           type: string
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3335052Z         owners:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3336542Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3338837Z           required: true
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3339388Z           type: string
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3340004Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3340467Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3341179Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3341893Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3344069Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3345261Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3345696Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3346217Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3347092Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3397990Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3398310Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3399602Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3401872Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3402642Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3404097Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3405390Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3406252Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3428365Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3429516Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3430079Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3430371Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3430670Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3431557Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3432384Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3432956Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3433159Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3435842Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3446806Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3447346Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3447939Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3448189Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3449114Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3449968Z                 try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3450562Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3451478Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3452353Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3453086Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3453714Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3455287Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3472746Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3475494Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3476076Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3502539Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3503671Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3504154Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3504820Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3505099Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3505287Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3506078Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3506936Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3507996Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3508540Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3509938Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3510941Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3511420Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3511687Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3511869Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3512924Z               try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3513745Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3515725Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3516813Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3519451Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3519963Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3520238Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3520650Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3521771Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3522657Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3523135Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3523410Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3524021Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3525215Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3526202Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3527159Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3527916Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3528209Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3528414Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3529599Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3531688Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3533124Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3533647Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3534421Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3534665Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3535391Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3536020Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3536660Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3537270Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3538204Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3539137Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3540284Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3542711Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3543419Z                   })
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3543917Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3544389Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3544604Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3545622Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3546736Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3547233Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3547706Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3547921Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3548772Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3549652Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3550176Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3550333Z                 try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3550953Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3552732Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3553527Z                     body
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3554645Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3555772Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3557913Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3559453Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3560607Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3561100Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3561530Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3561795Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3561943Z tools:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3562316Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3562719Z   github:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3563111Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3564045Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3565224Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3566474Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3567389Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3568494Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3568721Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3569833Z ---

2026-04-14T07:28:29.3600866Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3601264Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3602913Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3604727Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3605356Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3606675Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3607146Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3608078Z       inputs:

2026-04-14T07:28:29.3612712Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3614342Z           required: true
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3615434Z           type: string
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3616811Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3617319Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3618364Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3619035Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3619851Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3620940Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3621369Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3621876Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3622720Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3623417Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3623654Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3624805Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3627028Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3627970Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3629396Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3630577Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3631404Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3632514Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3633010Z                 return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3633976Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3634254Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3634544Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3635373Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3636156Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3636691Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3636892Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3639585Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3642087Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3643116Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3643430Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3644256Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3645197Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3646002Z                 try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3646575Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3647643Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3648494Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3649267Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3649878Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3650773Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3652642Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3655214Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3655765Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3656738Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3658005Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3662346Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3663001Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3663273Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3663453Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3664568Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3667358Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3668148Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3668657Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3670334Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3672060Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3672544Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3672821Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3673004Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3673565Z               try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3674538Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3675606Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3676743Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3678099Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3678585Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3678853Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3679243Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3680325Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3681832Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3682321Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3682593Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3683175Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3684329Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3685213Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3686163Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3686635Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3686901Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3687113Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3688591Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3691131Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3692948Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3693461Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3693739Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3693956Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3694650Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3695254Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3695883Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3696483Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3697180Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3698336Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3699445Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3700512Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3702079Z                   })
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3702572Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3703019Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3703850Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3705170Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3706164Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3707322Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3708253Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3708489Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3709329Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3710205Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3710693Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3710850Z                 try {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3711486Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3712399Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3713172Z                     body
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3713666Z                   });
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3714754Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3716072Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3717877Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3719733Z                   return;
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3720249Z                 }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3720681Z               }
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3721053Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3721202Z tools:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3721591Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3721993Z   github:
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3722389Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3723115Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3724439Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3725602Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3726666Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3727010Z 
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3727190Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3729267Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3730419Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-14T07:28:29.3831901Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
